TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Man-ku, title = Man-ku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Man-ku} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == Man-kuśõľŤį∑ Man-ku "Tay a kamu ŗłöŗł≤ŗłáŗłĀŗł≠ŗłĀ, Ing a kamu Bangkok" cen-bu a kamu u sulit Kung-tye-ma-ha-na-kung "nu Tay-kow a angangan atu satabakiay a tukay, tizaay a layak pangangan han tu Tay-cin, Man-ku nu Tay-kow a cen-sce, kezay, mapapacakay,saculil,lalangawan,ke-ci pasubana' atu cacana a angangan. i 2020 a mihcaan pikinsa tu tademaw, Man-ku izaw tu ku1053.9 emang ku tademaw, calap tuTay-kow a tademaw 15.3%. 2010 a mihcaan tu nikinsaan tu tademaw, macaliway t uku 1400 emang ku tademaws, pakala tu 22.2% ku tademaw nu mkienengay i Mang-ku nu likutay a tukay. Mang-ku a tukay tini i Caw-pey-yey he a nuwalian a tukus, micapi tu Tay-kow-wan. Man-ku a likisi taneng mitahaw tu 15 se-ci A-yi-to-ye hungti a kanatal cacay adidi'ay a sapisiwbayan, uyni pisiwbayan sazikuz malahad mala nu tusaay a angangan nu tukay a kitizaan, masazuma sa i 1768 a mihcaan a Tun-u -li hungti a kalatal atu 1782 a mihcaan La-ta-na-ke-sin hungti a kanatal, zikuz i Sen-low ayzaay a ziday a pikuwan, Man-ku I 19 se-ci a zikuz malingatu mikawaw tu tukay a palahad, a musuayaw tu makay si-bangay a ngelu' sazikuz Syen-low pasumad hank u ngangan u Tay-kow han. Man-ku hanin nu 20 se-ci mala nu Tay-kow a cen-ce kalalebu a angangnan, natanengan tu Tay kowmipalasawan tu nu hungtiay a lekec au nu hulicen, kinapina a masumad atu kinapaina palekal tu likisi a kawaw. 1972 a mihcaan, Man-ku mapacumud tu micidekay a sin-ce-ci, i 1960 a zida katukuh 1980 a mihcaan kalamkam sa malahad, sakay Taay-kow a cen-ce, kezay, pasubana' sinsinbungan atu ayzaay a syakay tabaki ku kalilid. 1980 a mihcaan atu 1990 a mihcaan Ya-cow mikadum a kaakuti'an, katuud ku milakuit tu kanatal a kusi tiniay a kitizaan pulung patizeng I Man-ku. namahiza uyni a tukay ayza u gingku atu misiyubanay a kitizaan muliyaw misaniyzu'.u saculil ciniza atu pingaayan pisakapahan tu uzip a a,ngangan nu kanatal, mala u nalimaan, dengdeng atu pisalamaan. 1980ŚĻīšĽ£ŚíĆ1990 .
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == man-ku** man-ku "taj a kamu ******, iŇč a kamu baŇčkok" ¶…ôn-bu a kamu u sur~…ĺit kuŇč-tj…ô-ma-ńßa-na-kuŇč "nu taj-kow a aŇčaŇčan atu satabakiaj a tukaj, tizaaj a r~…ĺajak paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu taj- ¶in, man-ku nu taj-kow a ¶…ôn-s ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, mapapa ¶akaj,sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ,r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan,k…ô- ¶i pasubana Ē~ ° atu ¶a ¶ana a aŇčaŇčan. i **** a mińß ¶aan pikinsa tu tad…ômaw, man-ku izaw tu ku****.* …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw, ¶ar~…ĺap tutaj-kow a tad…ômaw **.*%. **** a mińß ¶aan tu nikinsaan tu tad…ômaw, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj t uku **** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaws, pakar~…ĺa tu **.*% ku tad…ômaw nu mki…ôn…ôŇčaj i maŇč-ku nu r~…ĺikutaj a tukaj. maŇč-ku a tukaj tini i ¶aw-p…ô-j…ô ńß…ô a nuwar~…ĺian a tukus, mi ¶api tu taj-kow-wan. man-ku a r~…ĺikisi tan…ôŇč mitańßaw tu ** s…ô- ¶i a-ji-to-j…ô ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a sapisiwbajan, ujni pisiwbajan sazikuz mar~…ĺańßad mar~…ĺa nu tusaaj a aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj a kitizaan, masazuma sa i **** a mińß ¶aan a tun-u -r~…ĺi ńßuŇčti a kar~…ĺatar~…ĺ atu **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺa-ta-na-k…ô-sin ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ, zikuz i s…ôn-r~…ĺow ajzaaj a zidaj a pikuwan, man-ku i ** s…ô- ¶i a zikuz mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw tu tukaj a par~…ĺańßad, a musuajaw tu makaj si-baŇčaj a Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° sazikuz sj…ôn-r~…ĺow pasumad ńßank u ŇčaŇčan u taj-kow ńßan. man-ku ńßanin nu ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺa nu taj-kow a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu a aŇčaŇčnan, natan…ôŇčan tu taj kowmipar~…ĺasawan tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ au nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶…ôn, kinapina a masumad atu kinapaina par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺikisi a kawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan, man-ku mapa ¶umud tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a sin- ¶…ô- ¶i, i **** a zida katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan kar~…ĺamkam sa mar~…ĺańßad, sakaj taaj-kow a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, pasubana Ē~ ° sinsinbuŇčan atu ajzaaj a sjakaj tabaki ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid. **** a mińß ¶aan atu **** a mińß ¶aan ja- ¶ow mikadum a kaakuti Ē~ °an, katuud ku mir~…ĺakuit tu kanatar~…ĺ a kusi tiniaj a kitizaan pur~…ĺuŇč patiz…ôŇč i man-ku. namańßiza ujni a tukaj ajza u giŇčku atu misijubanaj a kitizaan mur~…ĺijaw misanijzu Ē~ °.u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶iniza atu piŇčaajan pisakapańßan tu uzip a a,ŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa u nar~…ĺimaan, d…ôŇčd…ôŇč atu pisar~…ĺamaan. *********** .
S.FORM: == kakaliman == Man-kuśõľŤį∑ Man-ku "Tay a kamu ŗłöŗł≤ŗłáŗłĀŗł≠ŗłĀ, Ing a kamu Bangkok" cen-bu a kamu u sulit Kung-tye-ma-ha-na-kung "nu Tay-kow a angangan atu satabakiay a tukay, tizaay a layak pangangan han tu Tay-cin, Man-ku nu Tay-kow a cen-sce, kezay, mapapacakay,saculil,lalangawan,ke-ci pasubana' atu cacana a angangan. i 2020 a mihcaan pikinsa tu tademaw, Man-ku izaw tu ku1053.9 emang ku tademaw, calap tuTay-kow a tademaw 15.3%. 2010 a mihcaan tu nikinsaan tu tademaw, macaliway t uku 1400 emang ku tademaws, pakala tu 22.2% ku tademaw nu mkienengay i Mang-ku nu likutay a tukay. Mang-ku a tukay tini i Caw-pey-yey he a nuwalian a tukus, micapi tu Tay-kow-wan. Man-ku a likisi taneng mitahaw tu 15 se-ci A-yi-to-ye hungti a kanatal cacay adidi'ay a sapisiwbayan, uyni pisiwbayan sazikuz malahad mala nu tusaay a angangan nu tukay a kitizaan, masazuma sa i 1768 a mihcaan a Tun-u -li hungti a kalatal atu 1782 a mihcaan La-ta-na-ke-sin hungti a kanatal, zikuz i Sen-low ayzaay a ziday a pikuwan, Man-ku I 19 se-ci a zikuz malingatu mikawaw tu tukay a palahad, a musuayaw tu makay si-bangay a ngelu' sazikuz Syen-low pasumad hank u ngangan u Tay-kow han. Man-ku hanin nu 20 se-ci mala nu Tay-kow a cen-ce kalalebu a angangnan, natanengan tu Tay kowmipalasawan tu nu hungtiay a lekec au nu hulicen, kinapina a masumad atu kinapaina palekal tu likisi a kawaw. 1972 a mihcaan, Man-ku mapacumud tu micidekay a sin-ce-ci, i 1960 a zida katukuh 1980 a mihcaan kalamkam sa malahad, sakay Taay-kow a cen-ce, kezay, pasubana' sinsinbungan atu ayzaay a syakay tabaki ku kalilid. 1980 a mihcaan atu 1990 a mihcaan Ya-cow mikadum a kaakuti'an, katuud ku milakuit tu kanatal a kusi tiniay a kitizaan pulung patizeng I Man-ku. namahiza uyni a tukay ayza u gingku atu misiyubanay a kitizaan muliyaw misaniyzu'.u saculil ciniza atu pingaayan pisakapahan tu uzip a a,ngangan nu kanatal, mala u nalimaan, dengdeng atu pisalamaan. 1980ŚĻīšĽ£ŚíĆ1990 .

musuajaw tu makaj si-baŇčaj a Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° sazikuz sj…ôn-r~…ĺow pasumad ńßank u ŇčaŇčan u taj-kow ńßan. man-ku ńßanin nu ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺa nu taj-kow a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu a aŇčaŇčnan, natan…ôŇčan tu taj kowmipar~…ĺasawan tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ au nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶…ôn, kinapina a masumad atu kinapaina par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺikisi a kawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan, man-ku mapa ¶umud tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a sin- ¶…ô- ¶i, i **** a zida katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan kar~…ĺamkam sa mar~…ĺańßad, sakaj taaj-kow a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, pasubana Ē~ ° sinsinbuŇčan atu ajzaaj a sjakaj tabaki ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid.
